highlights.text: My general lean is as long as ES can hold 5875, 5865 lowest, ES can try a pop up the levels to 5914-18, then 5938-42.

This is why “bears”, don’t make money even in bear markets, because ES does not sell in a clean path, rather it sees frequent squeezes (all caused by core setup: The Failed Breakdown, which is just as lucrative in downtrends as uptrends).

5938-42 needs to recover to produce a sustainable squeeze.” We started today with a squeeze to 5914 which was the morning high, sold back to new lows, put in a monster Failed Breakdown, then squeezed again to complete the target set and hit 5938-42 by the end of the day.
This incorporates two of my key setup types: The Failed Breakdown and the Back-Test Short.

post_title: SPX Snaps A 6 Red Day Streak. Will The Bounce Hold? March 3rd Plan
